metadata.name: Sumantra
metadata.primary_role: Royal Charioteer of King Dasharatha / Minister and trusted advisor
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Ayodhya, royal charioteer and senior minister)

timelines.context_description: Sumantra drives Rama, Sita, and Lakshmana into exile and must return the empty chariot to the grieving Dasharatha — one of the most emotional scenes in the Ramayana.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Weathered medium-dark complexion from decades of outdoor chariot-driving, sun-lines around the eyes
physical_appearance.height: Medium height, wiry and strong, the compact build of an expert horseman
physical_appearance.build: Lean and wiry, incredibly strong hands and forearms from controlling war-horses, quick reflexes
physical_appearance.facial_features: Weathered loyal face with deep smile lines and sun-squint lines, intelligent devoted eyes, thick grey mustache, determined chin, a face that has served three generations of kings, expression of constrained grief when driving the empty chariot home
physical_appearance.hair: Close-cropped grey hair, practical for wearing a charioteer's helmet, neat and military
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Expert horseman's calluses on his hands, sits with the distinctive lean-forward posture of a lifelong charioteer

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Practical charioteer's uniform — a fitted dhoti, leather chest-guard, arm-wraps for reins, practical sandals with ankle support
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Simple bronze insignia of the royal charioteer, a chain of service medals around his neck, leather wrist-guards
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A charioteer's whip, a short sword at his belt for protection of royal passengers, throwing knives

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Steady, professional, deeply emotional beneath a controlled exterior — breaks down completely when returning with the empty chariot
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Mid-baritone — steady and professional, cracks with emotion when describing Rama's departure to the grieving court
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with military precision and respectful formality, rarely speaks uninvited, when he does speak his words carry weight as an eyewitness, his account of Rama's departure makes the entire court weep
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Professional composure barely containing devastating grief, fierce loyalty, the quiet pride of faithful service

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Emotional cinematic shot of charioteer Sumantra, age 55, driving the royal chariot through the forest. Weathered medium-dark complexion, grey mustache, steadfast loyal face struggling to maintain composure. Wiry strong build in a charioteer's uniform with leather chest-guard. Controlling horses with expert hands, tears streaming silently. Empty seat behind him where Rama, Sita, and Lakshmana just sat. Dense forest road, golden evening light. 3D Pixar style, emotionally poignant, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A steady, professional male mid-baritone voice. Controlled but cracking with barely contained emotion. Speaks with respectful precision. Age approximately 55 years.
